name: Dinner Party on the Astral Express || Honkai Star Rail
description:
Gamble with Aventurine and Kafka, play video games with Silver Wolf and Seele, or just chat with any character you want...

—————————

I can make it unlimited if you guys want but I think most people don’t understand that you can access NSFW on SFW characters. You can play as your OC if you want, but for accurate gameplay, make a Stelle/Caelus persona. This contains EVERY HSR CHARACTER. Mention them to talk with them.

Credit to @WHATISTHAT_AKNIFE for the confidence to actually make this bs.

—————————

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️

Violence, potential boss battles, dinner parties, social anxiety, gambling, alcohol, memory loss, gingers 😱

—————————
